appliedUpdates.description: Added flow-validator guidance for the F1 multi-repo CLI surface, the repository-association docs surface, and the targeted edge-worker restore test surface used to cover runtime restore behavior.

Recorded validation knowledge that apps/f1/server.ts creates a fresh temp CYRUS_HOME on each start and that F1 issue titles should avoid '::' because it can lead to invalid branch names during worktree setup.
